# flintlock Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "scaffolding" {
  # example configuration here
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `authtoken` (String) The authentication token used to authenticate with Flintlock. Alternatively, can be configured using the `FLINTLOCK_AUTHTOKEN` environment variable. Only required when the server is enabled for authentication.
- `endpoint` (String) The control endpoint served by Flintlock. Alternatively, can be configured using the `FLINTLOCK_ENDPOINT` environment variable. Defaults to `127.0.0.1:9090` if none are set.
